=Index of modules=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Buttons"| module Buttons >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Calendar"| module Calendar >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Carousel"| module Carousel >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Color_picker"| module Color_picker >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a color picker~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="D"| module Icons.D >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Icons built with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~D>> ~(~H~T~M~L with ~D~O~M identity~,
    suitable for being referenced from client~-side code~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Drawer"| module Drawer >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Drawer menu for mobile and ~Web applications
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="F"| module Icons.F >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Icons built with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~F>> ~(static ~H~T~M~L~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Form"| module Form >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Icons"| module Icons >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Output of <<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.Make >>~: a primitive <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon>> builder plus a handful of
    predefined icons for common ~U~I actions~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Lib"| module Lib >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="List"| module Lib.List >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Make"| module Page_transition.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|install~_global~_handler t take~_screenshot animation~_type>>
    creates a global onchangepage handler which is registered
    recursively and applies to all pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Make"| module Icons.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Build an icon module on top of an ~Eliom ~H~T~M~L implementation
    ~(<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~F>> or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Content~.~Html~.~D>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Nodeready"| module Nodeready >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Noderesize"| module Noderesize >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Page_transition"| module Page_transition >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This widget helps realize page transition with screenshots~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Picture_uploader"| module Picture_uploader >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Popup"| module Popup >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Popup widget
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Pulltorefresh"| module Pulltorefresh >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Pull to refresh
    ~This widget can handle any element that needs to be refreshed
    after being pulled down~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Range"| module Range >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Range selection widget
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Size"| module Size >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Spinner"| module Spinner >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Spinner widget
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Sticky"| module Sticky >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Style"| module Style >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module is an interface to get~Computed~Style~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Swipe"| module Swipe >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Time_picker"| module Time_picker >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a clock~-style time picker~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Tip"| module Tip >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Toggle"| module Toggle >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Binary toggle widget
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Tongue"| module Tongue >> ||
\\
